programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: From polar bears to roaring lions—this is GoPro Adventures at its wildest. Dive into jaw-dropping encounters with lions, whales, turtles, giraffes, and watch “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson at his South African sanctuary, where rescued predators find a second chance. It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.title: S2E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Motorbikes, speed, and pure adrenaline—this is the ultimate GoPro adventure. Ride with Mexican enduro master Didier Goirand, push limits alongside British racing icon Maria Costello, the only female motorcycle racer ever to be awarded an MBE, and feel the thrill with American motorsports legend and DC Shoes founder Ken Block. High-octane action, world-class talent, and breathtaking moments—you won’t want to miss a second.

programme.title: S3E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: The GoPro production crew journeys to the Marum Crater on Ambrym Island in Vanuatu to join adventurer photographers Geoff Mackley and Bradley Ambrose, the first people to stand at the edge of a boiling lava lake and witness the raw lifeblood of our planet. The adventure continues with Dr. Ingrid Visser, who has dedicated her life and research to protecting the most intelligent predator in the ocean, the orca. She swims alongside wild orcas and champions modern solutions to free them from captivity. Experience never-before-seen footage captured by a GoPro mounted to the dorsal fin of a wild orca, along with rare archival material from the Orca Research Trust. This is exploration and conservation at its most powerful.

programme.title: S1E1 Skate
programme.desc: This episode features the inspiring story of founders Miguel and Isabel. Driven by the belief that kids should be free to just be kids, #GoProForACause partner SanSkate is making a real difference in their community. Their mission is to provide a safe space for children who enter the workforce at a young age, giving them a chance to set aside their struggles and enjoy skateboarding. The episode also showcases the very best of GoPro skateboarding, featuring incredible talent from Andrew Brophy, Sewa Kroetkov, Madars Apse, and more.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: Ghost Attack on Sutton Street: Poltergeists and Paranormal Entities
programme.desc: Expert Ghost Hunters from Haunted Events UK search for life-after death in the notoriously haunted Old Street Market of Sutton Town in historic old England. The area is so haunted that within minutes the investigation's medium is contacted by not one, but four spirits, warning them not to split up or risk their lives.Ignoring the advice, they split into two teams. The first team lead by UK Paranormal Expert Lee Roberts, comes face to face with the child murderer named Tap Tap, who taunts them with noises and poltergeist activity. Team two uses thermal imaging cameras to pick up humanoid forms and warm hand prints, further witnessing their devices shockingly moved before their eyes, chairs tipping over, tables levitating, glasses thrown and doors slamming. The nightbecomes so terrifying that the hunt is called off, but not before one final terrifying incident. You have never witnessed a ghost hunt like this before. Blair Witch was a movie. This is real. Prepare yourselves for the most shocking Ghost Hunt ever recorded.

programme.title: 3:15 AM
programme.desc: LONG - Horror strikes at 3:15 AM in ways never before imagined. Truth is stranger than fiction in this euro horror anthology that opens a new dimension in sheer terror. This cutting edge horror anthology from France will curl your toes and rattle your soul.

programme.title: Paranormal Prisons: Portal to Hell on Earth
programme.desc: Who is the bloody figure wielding a meat cleaver, seen racing through the alleys of British Columbia’s Chinatown? Whoever he is, he has terrified dozens of witnesses, who have never been the same afterwards. The brutal history of Cornwall Jail, Ottawa’s most notorious prison, lives on as ghostly apparitions of tortured inmates terrorize modern visitors. In its heyday it was home to vicious criminals, and sadistic guards. Hangings, whippings and torture were daily affairs and spirits from that era still linger on in the maze of cell blocks and corridors. Many male criminals were hanged at the Northwest Mounted Police outpost known as Fort Saskatchewan, but only one woman. Florence Lassandro was dubbed the Mob Princess, and her spirit is one of many seen on the grounds and in the preserved buildings of this historic site. Journey through several of the world's most haunted prisons and experience real portals to hell on earth.

programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River

programme.title: Hot Water Ep121: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: With the mission complete, the contestants think the season is winding down—but HQ has other plans. Their once-fabricated cover story becomes reality, pulling them into a pulse-pounding new challenge designed to test strength, coordination, and mastery of weaponry. This hybrid competition pushes every skill to the limit, weeding out all but the most well-rounded tactical athletes. Along the way, the legendary Don Mann shares his own backstory, giving rare insight into the life and mindset of the man behind the mission. When the dust settles, only one competitor will rise above the rest—earning the title of the season’s most complete warrior.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

programme.title: 2018 Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach Finals Day | REPLAY
programme.desc: Today, Stephanie Gilmore and Italo Ferreira won the Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach, Stop No. 2 of the World Tour. After an exciting week of competitive drama, upsets and emotion, the final day of competition ran in 4-to-6ft conditions at the world renowned Bells Beach… 2018 marks the Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach’s 57th year around the sun, as well as 3x World Champion Mick Fanning's final event on the World Tour.

programme.title: Land Of Teranga | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 1
programme.desc: Sam Bleakley starts his journey through Senegal joined by Irish big wave surfer Easkey Britton and French pro Adrien Toyon. Their first stop is N'Gor Island, where they ride the wave seen in the opening sequence of "Endless Summer." On the island, they learn about Teranga, the Senegalese quality of hospitality, sharing, and welcomeness. They also meet up with Marta Imarisio, who has helped inspire the country's women and girls to get into surfing.

programme.title: 2025 Surf Abu Dhabi Pro | Highlights
programme.desc: Relive the 2025 Abu Dhabi Pro Finals as CT surfing debuts in the Middle East on a world-class wave.

programme.title: Inside Pro Surfing: Surf Abu Dhabi Pro 2025
programme.desc: The WSL Championship Tour makes its groundbreaking debut in the Middle East at the 2025 Surf Abu Dhabi Pro. The second stop on the CT marks professional surfing's continued global expansion and also establishes Abu Dhabi as an official surf destination. Engineered for excellence, this high-performance wave will provide a canvas for the world's best surfers set against a stunning backdrop of the Arabian Gulf. The event will showcase not only the remarkable evolution of professional surfing beyond its traditional roots, but also the infinite possibility for progression from athletes like rookie Erin Brooks, former World Champion Italo Ferreira, and reigning World Champ Caity Simmers.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.title: The Motocross Files
programme.desc: David Bailey’s story is one of dedication and inspiration. The factory Honda rider won five National Championships before a tragic injury in 1987 ended his motocross career giving him the biggest challenge of his life and inspiring greatness once again.

programme.title: Where Cars Don't Dare
programme.desc: Where Cars Don't Dare follows AdMo Tours on a remarkable journey through the Mojave Desert by dirt bike. programme.desc: When Manny and Luke join Claire for Alex's academic decathlon for the weekend, Phil attempts to throw a boys' night at the house; Manny and Luke bar mitzvah hop, looking for cute girls; Cam and Mitch arrange a surprise baby gift for Jay and Gloria.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch joins Cam in an effort to save a tree in a park; Jay and Manny are pushed out of their comfort zones when they attend an Olympic-themed birthday party; Claire takes Gloria on Costco-run, but "pregnancy brain" makes it an eventful trip.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny and Luke's little league team makes it into a playoff game unexpectedly, so Claire and Cameron scramble to find a location; Claire and Cam try their hand at flipping a house; Gloria tries a bonding technique by using a microphone.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is excited for the family to celebrate New Year's in Palm Springs, but when the hotel is less than anticipated, everyone decides to do their own thing; Haley and Alex watch over the kids, which turns out to be quite difficult.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: With the baby coming, Jay and Gloria go to extra lengths to throw Manny a special surprise 14th birthday party; Phil and Claire deal with the new much older guys Haley has been hanging out with; Cam becomes jealous of Lily and Mitch's special bond.
